turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, main puchna chahta tha ki kya aap log cash payment accept karte ho ya sirf digital hi hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, hum dono accept karte hain — cash bhi aur digital bhi. Billing counter par aap cash, UPI, debit ya credit card se payment kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Achha. Aur kya koi surcharge hai card pe?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Credit card par 1.5% convenience charge lagta hai. UPI aur debit card par koi extra charge nahin hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh okay. Main UPI se dene ki koshish karunga. Mera naam Rithvik Nair hai, mujhe apna outstanding balance jaanna tha.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji Mr. Nair. Aapka registered number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Rithvik Nair ka balance hai ₹3,800 — ek OPD visit aur ek ultrasound ke liye. UPI ID hai sunriseclinic@axisbank.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Done, main abhi pay karta hoon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Mr. Nair. Payment ke baad screenshot WhatsApp kar dijiye 9876543200 par, confirmation mil jaayegi.
